chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/115)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/115)
text: أَخَذَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حِينَ غَدَا مِنْ مِنًى فِي طَرِيقِ ضَبٍّ وَ رَجَعَ مَا بَيْنَ الْمَأْزِمَيْنِ وَ كَانَ إِذَا سَلَكَ طَرِيقاً لَمْ يَرْجِعْ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ismail Bin Hammam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, when he<sup>saww</sup> went from Mina, took the Zabb road, and returned by what is between Al-Mazimayn, and it was such that whenever he<sup>saww</sup> travelled by a road, did not return in it (i.e. came back from another way)’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Isma‘il ibn Hammam who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, when leaving Mina moved through the path of Dabb and returned from between al-Mazimin, and when he walked through a path, he would not return by the same path.”
